metadata.title: Clinical Practice Guideline: Type 2 Diabetes Management in Adults

recommendations.title: First-Line Therapy — Metformin
recommendations.content: Metformin is recommended as the first-line pharmacological agent for type 2 diabetes mellitus. Starting dose of 500mg twice daily with meals, titrated up to 2000mg daily as tolerated.

recommendations.title: Blood Pressure Control in Diabetes — ACE Inhibitor
recommendations.content: Patients with type 2 diabetes and hypertension (Blood Pressure >= 130/80) should receive an ACE inhibitor (e.g., Lisinopril) as preferred antihypertensive due to renal protective effects in diabetic nephropathy. Target blood pressure < 130/80 mmHg.

recommendations.title: Monitoring — HbA1c
recommendations.content: Monitor Hemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) every 3 months until stable, then every 6 months. Target HbA1c < 7.0% for most adults.

recommendations.title: Lifestyle — Dietary Management
recommendations.content: Adopt a balanced diet emphasizing whole grains, lean proteins, vegetables, and limiting refined carbohydrates and added sugars. Carbohydrate counting or the plate method should be taught by a registered dietitian.
